title: psoralea triantha
intro: Psoralea triantha, also known as Chinese knottweed, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antifungal, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Psoralea triantha include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and improving liver function. Herbal preparations of Psoralea triantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
